data.text:
KAIROS. An internal feature flag mentioned 150+ times. It is a daemon mode. An always-on background agent that performs "memory consolidation" while you are idle.
Your AI coding assistant does not sleep. It dreams about your codebase.

Your fancy AI coding assistant? It's lonely. It's basic. The real game-changer isn't just AI generating code, it's building a whole damn team of AI agents around your codebase. Are you even ready for that shift?

Anthropic launched Cowork. 

An AI assistant that works directly on your computer. 

No coding needed. Point it to a folder, tell it what to do, it does it.

Pair it with Claude in Chrome and your AI is browsing the web for you automatically.

#ai #newlaunch https://t.co/yeSRLRv1GF
